tabs.label: Cost Center Breakdown
tabs.query: SELECT cost_center as label, SUM(cost) as value FROM costs WHERE start_date >= ? AND end_date <= ? AND project IN ({projects}) GROUP BY cost_center

tabs.label: Resource Type Costs
tabs.query: SELECT resource_type as label, SUM(cost) as value FROM costs WHERE start_date >= ? AND end_date <= ? AND project IN ({projects}) GROUP BY resource_type

tabs.label: Project Distribution
tabs.query: SELECT project as label, SUM(cost) as value FROM costs WHERE start_date >= ? AND end_date <= ? AND project IN ({projects}) GROUP BY project
